improvement_1.title: FIX regression prevention constraint
improvement_1.proposed_text: - **Prevent regressions.** Before committing, verify that your fix does not introduce new defects on lines you touched. Check for: off-by-one errors in updated ranges, copy-paste errors from adapted code, incorrect negation of conditions, and missing error/null checks in modified code paths. A fix loop that creates new findings in the next audit is not complete.

improvement_2.title: Verified-clean depth enforcement
improvement_2.proposed_text: A category is verified-clean only when one complete execution path through the changed code has been traced from entry to exit. Surface-level scanning is insufficient evidence. Banned shallow evidence phrases (rejected without review): "no issues found", "looks good", "verified clean", "pattern appears correct", "seems fine", "appears correct". Valid evidence must name the function and the path traced, following this format: "Traced <function> from <entry> to <exit>, verified <specific check>."

improvement_1.actionable_reason: Lists 4 specific checks to perform: off-by-one, copy-paste errors, incorrect negation, missing error/null checks
improvement_1.verifiable_reason: A reviewer can verify by checking if new findings in the next audit loop originated from lines the fix touched
improvement_1.negative_scope_reason: Names what is out of bounds: a fix that creates new findings is not complete

improvement_2.actionable_reason: Lists specific banned phrases and a required evidence format with concrete example
improvement_2.verifiable_reason: A reviewer can check the evidence field against the banned list and format requirement
improvement_2.negative_scope_reason: Names specific phrases that are out of bounds and will be rejected

loop_count.reason: Fewer regressions means fewer loops needed to converge

finding_regressions.reason: Improvement 1 directly requires pre-commit verification against new defects

scope_violations.reason: No improvement targets scope violations; Tests 2,3,5 not implemented

verified_clean_depth.reason: Improvement 2 directly bans shallow phrases and requires specific evidence format
